name: Fruit Topped Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese and sugar together until creamy.
2. Mix in the whipped topping.
3. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
4. Add the pie filling around the edge of the pie.
5. Chill for at least 3 hours.
6. Garnish with additional whipped topping, if desired.
